Title: Valid card checkout
Content: Step 1: Add item. Step 2: Enter valid Visa. Step 3: Submit. Expected: Order confirmed.

Title: Empty cart checkout
Content: Step 1: Go to checkout with empty cart. Expected: Error message shown.

Title: Expired card rejection
Content: Step 1: Add item. Step 2: Enter expired card. Step 3: Submit. Expected: Payment declined message.
